name: morph-product-detail
description: A compact product-preview card that morphs into a full product-detail page: the product image is a single persistent element that resizes from a 56px thumbnail into a full-width hero (a real shared-element move, not a crossfade) while the preview text swaps out through AnimatePresence and the Card detail springs in. Name + rating, price, a description, a row of Badge size chips and an Add-to-cart Button pair stagger in on open and reverse-stagger out on close. Built on framer-motion via block-motion, so the whole morph collapses to a plain crossfade under prefers-reduced-motion.

notes: Collapsed, the whole preview is a single button with an explicit aria-label ("View <product> details"), so it is keyboard- and screen-reader-reachable
Expanded, the card exposes a labelled close control and the product name renders as plain text (not a heading) so it never forces a heading level onto the host page
The size chips are grouped with an accessible group label and the selected size is not colour-only — it carries aria-current plus a visually-hidden "(selected)" label
The gradient product image is a decorative placeholder (aria-hidden) and never the click target; the wishlist icon Button carries an explicit aria-label
The size/stagger morph respects prefers-reduced-motion via MotionProvider, collapsing to a plain crossfade

intents: a product card that expands into a full product-detail page
a shared-element morph from a product preview to a product page
an animated product card built on ibirdui
